RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0003 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Hana Silva Date of Birth: 18/10/1981 SSN (tokenized): TKN-374495 Annual Income: $52,000 Employer: Globex Loan Amount: $11,000 Term (months): 48 Branch: Leeds Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN55772AL Toyota Leaf 2020 EV New 15,000 VIN93089AL BMW Sportage 2022 ICE New 34,000 Authorized Signature: Hana Silva
